global.description: An ad for EarnPath that features a solid blue background covering the entire canvas, creating a calming and cohesive visual environment. In the top left corner, there is the EarnPath logo, which consists of a light blue rounded rectangle containing the text 'EarnPath' in a darker blue font. This logo occupies a small area, allowing it to stand out against the solid blue background. Just below and to the right of the logo, there are decorative elements in the form of a blue circle and a blue rectangle, which are positioned in the upper left section of the ad. The circle partially overlaps the rectangle, which has a slightly darker blue outline, adding depth and interest to the design. The background of these shapes is a lighter blue, creating a subtle contrast with the solid blue backdrop. In the center of the ad, there are two lines of body text displayed prominently. The first line reads 'Secure & simple' in a large, bold white font, centered horizontally within a blue rectangular background. Below it, a smaller line reads 'Built for peace of mind' in a lighter shade of blue. This text is positioned towards the middle of the ad, with ample space around it, ensuring that the message is clear and prominent. At the bottom of the ad, we see the call-to-action button, which is a rounded rectangular shape in white with a black outline. This button is positioned towards the bottom center of the ad and features the text 'Claim reward' displayed in bold black font, centered within the button. The overall layout is structured to guide the viewer's eye from the logo at the top left, through the central message, and down to the call-to-action at the bottom, creating a logical flow that encourages engagement.
global.main_message: EarnPath offers a secure and simple solution for peace of mind.

embedding_texts.global_text: This ad for EarnPath utilizes a solid blue background and features a prominent logo, body text conveying security and simplicity, and a clear call-to-action button, all designed to create a calming and engaging experience.
